shots.prompt: A single enormous human eye opens in a black void, the iris a slowly swirling galaxy of neon color, the pupil expanding hypnotically toward the viewer. Ultra-smooth, mesmerizing.
We fall through the pupil into a blooming fractal flower of infinite unfolding petals, neon gold and magenta spiraling outward in perfect symmetry. Seamless morph, dreamlike.
The fractal flower morphs into a breathing garden of glowing crystalline plants, kaleidoscopic symmetry rippling and pulsing with bioluminescent light. Hypnotic continuous transformation.
The crystal garden melts into rivers of liquid rainbow flowing upward against gravity, geometry folding and unfolding like living origami. Smooth psychedelic morph.
The rivers braid together into a tunnel of recursive mandalas spiraling toward a brilliant glowing core, endless depth. Mesmerizing forward motion.
The mandala tunnel breathes and dissolves into soft pulsing light, slowly forming a single radiant glowing doorway floating in color. Calm, inviting cliffhanger.
